Description: Event arguments for the Lottie player loaded event.

PublicProperties.Name: ElementId
PublicProperties.Description: Gets the ID of the Lottie player element.

PublicProperties.Name: CurrentFrame
PublicProperties.Description: Gets the current frame of the animation as a zero-based index.

PublicProperties.Name: TotalFrames
PublicProperties.Description: Gets the total number of frames processed.
